title: More Menu (Part 2/2)
heading: Announcements
text: as specified at “Annexure-A” | WHEREAS, acquisition of land area measuring 4.295 acres in R. S. Plot No / Nos. as specified at “Annexure-A”, Class as specified at “Annexure-A”, in Khatian No/Nos. as specified at “Annexure-A”, under Narsingarh Sheet No. 2/P Mouja of Gandhigram Tehsil under Mohanpur Sub-Division for the purpose of development of International Cricket Stadium at Narsingarh to be constructed / developed by the Hon. Secretary, Tripura Cricket Association, Agartala, West Tripura District is/are proposed. | 01/02/2025 | 07/02/2025 | |
